book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council

title: Canon XIV.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Let the canon of our holy God-bearing Fathers be confirmed in this particular also; that a presbyter be not ordained before he is thirty years of age, even if he be a very worthy man, but let him be kept back.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: For our Lord Jesus Christ was baptized and began to teach when he was thirty.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: In like manner let no deacon be ordained before he is twenty-five, nor a deaconess before she is forty.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: A presbyter thirty years of age, a deacon twenty-five, and a deaconess forty.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: It may be interesting to note here that by the law of the Roman Communion the canonical ages are as follows:

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: A subdeacon must have completed his twenty-first year, a deacon his twenty-second, a priest his twenty-fourth, and a bishop his thirtieth.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: None of the inferior clergy can hold a simple benefice before he has begun his fourteenth year.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Ecclesiastical dignities, such as Cathedral canonries, cannot be conferred on any who have not finished the twenty-second year.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: A benefice to which is attached a cure of souls can be given only to one who is over twenty-four, and a diocese only to one who has completed his thirtieth year.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: In the Anglican Communion the ages are, in England, for a bishop “fully thirty years of age,” for a priest twenty-four, and for a deacon twenty-three: and in the United States, for a bishop thirty years of age, for a priest twenty-four, and for a deacon twenty-one.
